title: E-Commerce Product Listing
subtitle: Sorting, filtering, array chaining, keys, and React.memo for list performance
prerequisites: week1 — list rendering, map, and keys from Day 3
day08 — fetch patterns and UI states
day09 — debounced search and custom hooks
expectedOutcome: Filter and sort product lists with array chaining methods
Render responsive product grids with stable React keys
Apply React.memo to prevent unnecessary list item re-renders
Explain keys and rendering performance in interview terms
definitionOfDone: Price range filter works with min/max inputs
Sort by price and name works ascending and descending
Responsive product grid with stable keys

tomorrowPreview.title: Infinite Scrolling
tomorrowPreview.summary: Tomorrow you will load products in pages automatically with Intersection Observer, diving deep into the event loop, microtasks, and macrotasks.
